title: Western Yesterdays
writer: Ashton Dearholt, Francis Ford, E.R. Hickson
actors: Edmund Cobb, Florence Gilbert, William White
plot: Rose Silvers (Florence Gilbert) wanders into an outlaw's camp (Pinto Pete played by Ashton Dearholt) as an orphan after losing her father who was killed while gambling. She depends on Sheriff Blake for moral support, but she belie...
